channel.title: GitHub Mathematica Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Mathematica in GitHub

item.title: gtech-mulearn/IEEE-LAUNCHPAD
item.description: Connect with top employers and elevate your career! Craft your digital identity, engage with μLearn Campus Chapters, and showcase your skills to potential recruiters. Don't miss this opportunity to launch your career with LAUNCHPAD Job Fair! 🚀
